title: Cosmos Brain Network — neural firing graph
title_vi: Cosmos Brain Network — đồ thị nơ-ron phát xung
summary: A seeded graph of glowing neuron nodes wired by synapse lines, with pulses of light travelling along the connections and nodes flaring as each pulse arrives. Pure Canvas 2D, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. KEY TECHNIQUES: nodes are seeded with mulberry32 and each connects to its 2-3 nearest neighbours to form a synapse graph; nodes drift on periodic sine paths (base + amp*sin(2pi*u*k+phase)); each edge carries a pulse at param f=(u*k+phase) mod 1 with INTEGER k so every pulse returns at LOOP; the destination node flares (brighter, larger radial glow) as f nears its end. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t). TUNE: node count N, neighbour degree, edge k/speed, AC accent colours, drift amp.
summary_vi: Đồ thị nơ-ron gieo hạt với các nút phát sáng nối bằng đường synapse; các xung ánh sáng chạy dọc kết nối và nút bùng sáng khi xung tới. Thuần Canvas 2D, không lib, chạy offline; deterministic & loop liền.
notes: Xung chạy theo f=(u*k+phase) mod 1 với k nguyên nên loop khít; nút bùng sáng khi xung tới đích.
